title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: AI Master demonstrates building a complete event management system with role-based access control, permissions, and automations using Softr's AI Co-Builder. The video showcases how Softr can reduce expensive AI token usage compared to manual prompt-based development.
